---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect behavior in an applet or the dispatcher
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence describing what's wrong. -->

## Reproduction
<!-- Exact command(s) and input. Include the moonraker --version output. -->

```sh
moonraker --version
moonraker <applet> <args...>
```

## Expected
<!-- What did you expect to happen? Cite the Mainsail behavior if relevant. -->

## Actual
<!-- What actually happened? Include exit code, stdout, stderr. -->

## Environment
- OS / version:
- Architecture (x64 / ARM64):
- Lua version (`lua -v`):
- Moonraker version or commit:
- Build source: pre-built binary / built from source

## Additional context
